shape_semantics: code cmp,vp,vpc,naive = W,W,L,W: cmplog (I2S alone), value_profile (VP alone), and naive ALL resolve; ONLY value_profile_cmplog (vpc, both techniques) blocks. The canonical ANTI-SYNERGY / mutual-interference shape: the fuzzer holding the SUPERSET of techniques loses to each of its components AND to the baseline.

hypotheses.label: vpc's combined I2S+VP corpus admission inflates and collapses composition, starving the single-technique-found path that both cmplog-alone and value_profile-alone sustain

measurement.note: Proposed-but-not-relied-on. Would need on-disk vpc, cmplog, value_profile corpora (all available for harfbuzz) plus a fraction-of-corpus-bytes-equal-target-value computation per gate offset.

hypotheses.prediction: G1 (the test we WOULD run if it were decidable): vpc_corpus_size >> max(cmp_corpus_size, vp_corpus_size) AND vpc_target_value_fraction < min(cmp_target_value_fraction, vp_target_value_fraction) -- i.e. vpc's corpus is strictly larger yet its share of seeds carrying the decisive codepoint value is strictly lower than either single-technique fuzzer, evidencing dilution/starvation rather than a simple too-few-execs failure.
hypotheses.rule: vpc_corpus_size / max(cmp_corpus_size, vp_corpus_size) >= 1.3 AND vpc_target_value_fraction < 0.5 * min(cmp_target_value_fraction, vp_target_value_fraction)
hypotheses.why_not_decidable: Even if the rule fires, a larger-but-off-target vpc corpus is equally consistent with the NULL alternative 'vpc simply explored a different region (different seed scheduling / RNG path), and never happened to converge here' as with the causal claim 'interference starved this path.' The two are NOT separable from per-branch corpus data: interference is a counterfactual (what vpc WOULD have reached without the second technique), and corpus composition shows only what vpc DID reach. There is no positive signature of an absence.

guardrail_status.G1: The single hypothesis carries a falsifiable, discriminating prediction in principle, but its discriminating power against the null ('vpc just explored differently') cannot be realized from the available data -- so it fails G1 in practice, not by construction.
guardrail_status.G2_violation: FATAL. The shape's defining label-source is exactly 'vpc blocks.' Every candidate measurement here is a measurement of vpc's own corpus/behavior -- the same fuzzer whose blocking DEFINED the shape. There is no technique-independent observable: we cannot verify 'vpc blocks because of interference' with anything other than vpc itself. Independence (G2) is unattainable for an anti-synergy-of-the-superset shape.
guardrail_status.G3: An honest non-result is the correct output. All 4 branches (2 distinct harfbuzz gates) route to fallback:inconclusive.

data_realities_respected.lineage_event_forbidden: Did NOT propose any seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence 'I2S event' or 'gradient event' descriptor -- both I2S (mutator) and VP (CMP_MAP feedback) are untagged/invisible in mutation_op (data_realities #1, #2). The only thing measurable about VP/I2S interplay is what the corpus REACHES (size/value-fraction), which is precisely what makes the causal interference claim undecidable.
data_realities_respected.byte_alignment_ok_here: These are fixed-offset 4-byte codepoint VALUE gates (contiguous_literal, equal-width seeds), so byte-fraction alignment is technically valid -- the obstruction is NOT alignment (unlike structural-assembly shapes) but the counterfactual/independence problem.
data_realities_respected.corpus_targets: harfbuzz has on-disk corpora, so the proposed measurement is RUNNABLE; it is simply not DISCRIMINATING. The non-result is a logic/independence limit, not a data-availability limit.

notes: Hardest shape; honest non-result. WWLW is the superset anti-synergy: vpc holds BOTH techniques yet blocks where each component (and naive) resolves. (1) NON-SYNTHESIZABLE (confirmed step5b_new_v2): the loss is an emergent corpus-SCALE / seed-scheduling effect of running two corpus-admission regimes together over a 12h budget -- it does not localize to any per-branch gate property, so no synthetic harness reproduces it (and none is authored here). (2) NON-DISCRIMINABLE from per-branch data: interference is a counterfactual (what vpc WOULD reach without the 2nd technique); the corpus shows only what vpc DID reach, and a larger off-target vpc corpus is indistinguishable from 'vpc merely explored differently.' (3) G2-unattainable: the only available observable is vpc's own corpus, which is the label-source itself -- no technique-independent witness exists. Candidate hypotheses MERGED: the signatures split h0 (I2S-as-winner) vs h1 (VP-as-winner) and ascribe interference to the OTHER technique, but the testable residue is identical for both -- 'vpc's combined corpus failed to sustain the decisive codepoint' -- so all 4 member-halves collapse to one hypothesis, which then fails to be decidable. Proposed corpus_size_ratio descriptor (registry_tool: null) is recorded for completeness so a future tool/measurement design can revisit, NOT relied on. Targets: harfbuzz branches 5624 (case 0x0E37u) and 5660 (CCC118 / U+0EB9 Lao sign u/uu), both in recategorize_combining_class in hb-ot-shape-fallback.cc.
